description: Part of a Qaraite betrothal deed from the time of the Nasi Ḥizqiyya b. Shelomo b. David. Dated: Thursday, 9 Shevaṭ 1373 Seleucid = 22 January 1062 CE. Location: Fustat. It is identified as a betrothal deed and not a ketubba because the quotation from Hosea 2:21–22 is typically found in betrothal deeds. The names of the couple are not preserved. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
